Bash(composer install *)
PowerShell(composer install 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($php = Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($php\) { Write-Output "PHP: $\($php.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "PHP no encontrado" }; $docker = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($docker\) { Write-Output "Docker: $\($docker.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "Docker no encontrado" })

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://getcomposer.org/composer-stable.phar" -OutFile "composer.phar" -UseBasicParsing; if \(Test-Path composer.phar\) { Write-Output "Descargado: $\(\(Get-Item composer.phar\).Length\) bytes" })
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php composer.phar install --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php composer.phar update nikic/php-parser --no-interaction --with-all-dependencies 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell(Test-Path vendor/nikic/php-parser; if \(Test-Path vendor/nikic/php-parser\) { Write-Output "OK - nikic/php-parser instalado" } else { Write-Output "Falta - intentando require"; docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php composer.phar require nikic/php-parser:^5.3 --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20 })
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-descriptions 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-descriptions 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --with-descriptions 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 35)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-descriptions --force-descriptions 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 35)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --with-descriptions 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-deep-analysis 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-deep-analysis --force-deep 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($ollama = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:11434/api/tags -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ollama\) { Write-Output "Ollama OK"; $ollama.Content } else { Write-Output "Ollama no responde - hay que iniciarlo" })
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands --with-deep-analysis --force-deep 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -w /app php:8.3-cli php lego docs:graph --scope=Core/Commands 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)
